loading_tips: The bot works in group chats too
AI models can analyze images
In Artist mode, the bot draws anything you describe
GPT-4 Omni is best at handling complex tasks
Monkey AI supports voice messages in chats
Monkey AI supports more than 8 languages
Monkey AI keeps its models constantly updated
Copywriter mode removes errors and polishes your text
Neural networks don't think – they predict the next token
The monkey symbolizes curiosity and adaptability
Neural networks don't understand words – they work with number vectors
Monkey AI remembers the context of long conversations
In groups, the bot can reply to several people at once
Artist mode supports different styles
Monkey AI was born out of a love for experiments
Artist draws better when the description is detailed
Monkey AI can help with studying and work
Monkey AI works reliably and consistently
Monkey AI constantly improves the quality of its answers
Monkey AI is available any time of day or night
Monkey AI can explain complex things in simple words
Monkey AI loves interesting and unusual tasks

privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Monkey AI ("we", "our", or "us") collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our service.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.intro: When you use Monkey AI, we may collect the following data:

items.t: your user ID, username, first and last name, and language.
the messages, prompts, images, and audio you send to the assistant.
your selected model, preferences, and basic activity statistics.

sections.heading: 2. Use of Information
sections.intro: We use the collected information to:

items.t: Provide and operate the AI assistant, including chat, image generation, and transcription.
Maintain your conversation history across sessions.
Ensure security and prevent abuse of the service.
Respond to your requests and provide support.

sections.heading: 3. Third-Party Services
sections.body: To provide AI features, the content you submit is processed by OpenAI. The service is also delivered through Telegram. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

sections.heading: 4. Data Security
sections.body: We apply reasonable technical measures to protect your data, including authentication through Telegram. However, no method of transmission or storage is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

sections.heading: 5. Your Rights
sections.body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time. To make such a request, contact us at {support}

sections.heading: 6. Changes to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes take effect once the updated version is posted, and we recommend reviewing this page periodically.

terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of Monkey AI, including the Telegram bot and Mini App (the "Service"). By using the Service, you agree to these Terms.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing or using Monkey AI, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.

sections.heading: 2. Description of the Service
sections.body: Monkey AI is an assistant available in Telegram that provides text conversations, image generation, and audio transcription. The available features may change over time.

sections.heading: 3. Access
sections.body: Access to the Service may be limited and is granted at our discretion. You need a valid Telegram account and must comply with Telegram's rules when using the Service.

sections.heading: 4. Acceptable Use
sections.intro: When using the Service, you agree not to:

items.t: use it for any unlawful, harmful, or prohibited content;
abuse, disrupt, or overload the Service;
attempt to gain unauthorized access to or exploit the Service.

sections.heading: 5. Generated Content
sections.body: Responses and images are generated by artificial intelligence and may be inaccurate, incomplete, or offensive. You are solely responsible for how you use the generated content.

sections.heading: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available", without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the Service or from interruptions caused by third-party services.

sections.heading: 7. Changes to These Terms
sections.body: We may update these Terms from time to time. Your continued use of the Service after changes are posted means you accept the updated Terms.

sections.heading: 8. Governing Law
sections.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Russia.

sections.heading: 9. Contact
sections.body:
For any questions regarding these Terms, please contact:
Support: {support}
